description_long: This object is a rectangular, hardbound book with a glossy blue cover featuring gold embossed text in an East Asian script. The front cover is smooth and reflective, with no visible illustration or artwork apart from the text. The book's spine is narrow and also blue, with the gold text continuing vertically. The back cover is similarly blue and plain, while the inside pages are white with black printed text and a faint watermark or emblem visible on the left page. The book appears to be of medium thickness and is likely made from paper and cardboard, with a laminated or coated exterior for durability. Its overall appearance suggests it is a commemorative or official publication.
description: A glossy blue hardbound book with gold embossed text and a plain, reflective cover. The interior pages are white with black text and a faint emblem.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing a glossy blue surface with gold embossed text and no illustration.
description_view_1: The narrow spine is seen from the side, displaying the blue cover and a hint of gold text running vertically.
description_view_2: The book is open to reveal white pages with black printed text and a faint watermark or emblem on the left page.
description_view_3: The opposite spine view, showing the blue cover and the edge of the white pages, with minimal visible detail.
attribute_title_text: 陸軍軍官學校 二十期畢業紀念
attribute_spine_design: The spine is blue with gold text running vertically, matching the front cover. No additional decorative elements are visible.
